title: Wooden Tools+
description: Wooden tool variants for each item (cherry pickaxe, mangrove pickaxe)
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT NOTICE⚠️**
-------------

### **THIS PROJECT HAS BEEN ARCHIVED AND WILL NO LONGER RECEIVE UPDATES, USE [Reimagined Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-variants) INSTEAD**
###  

  
 
When installing the Datapack there is also a **_Required Texture Pack_** 


Wooden Tools+
----
Adding wooden tool varients to the game e.g: _mangrove axe_

**All Cherry, Mangrove & Spruce wooden tool varients have been added, to get the full list scroll down**


## **Currently added Varients:**
-  **Mangrove Axe**
-  **Mangrove Pickaxe**
-  **Mangrove Sword**
-  **Mangrove Shovel**
-  **Mangrove Hoe**
-  **Cherry Axe**
-  **Cherry Pickaxe**
-  **Cherry Sword**
-  **Cherry Shovel**
-  **Cherry Hoe**
-  **Spruce Axe**
-  **Spruce Pickaxe**
-  **Spruce Sword**
-  **Spruce Shovel**
-  **Spruce Hoe**
